Certified Reliability

Aanshi Fertilizers is a government-approved and licensed agricultural provider.

Fertilizer Retail License

Authorized by the Rajasthan Agriculture Department for the sale and distribution of all major fertilizer types.

Verified & Authentic

Pesticide Sale Certificate

Government verified license to handle and sell crop protection products and insecticides.

Verified & Authentic

Seeds Distribution License

Quality-assured distributor license for high-performance and hybrid seeds.

Verified & Authentic

Technical Expertise Certificate

Awarded for 15+ years of specialized knowledge in crop nutrition and pest control.

Verified & Authentic

Why Verification Matters

At Aanshi Fertilizers, we believe in transparency. Agricultural products directly affect food safety and farm productivity. That's why we maintain strict adherence to all government regulations and quality standards.

ISO Quality Standards
Agriculture Dept. Approved
Genuine Batch Tracking
